message.createfirefightingadd.intake_bou: Intake position bound to bucket controller
message.createfirefightingadd.bind_too_f: Too far from bound water intake!
createfirefightingadd.config.nozzleFireC: Probability (0-100%) that lava spray ignites flammable blocks per tick
createfirefightingadd.config.nozzleBuild: Ticks for spray range to build up from 0 to full distance (1-60). Uses ease-in quadratic for natural pressure buildup
createfirefightingadd.flow_meter.no_pump: No pump detected on the pipe network
createfirefightingadd.ponder.high_pressu: High Pressure Pump range and pressure
High Pressure Pumps scale Create's mechanical pump behaviour.
The amplification multiplier increases the pipe distance reached by pressure.
At the default multiplier of 2x, a 16 block Create range becomes 32 blocks.
The same multiplier also scales pump pressure, allowing higher flow speeds.
Change HighPressurePump.amplificationMultiplier in the server config to tune both values together.
createfirefightingadd.ponder.nozzle_basi: Cone Nozzles spread a rounded stream, while Flat Spray Nozzles make a wider sheet.
Feed a nozzle with fluid through pipes. Creative tanks are used here as compact examples.
Water, milk, potions, lava, flammable fuels, and dragon breath each use their own spray behaviour.
createfirefightingadd.ponder.nozzle_fire: Sprays can push entities along the stream.
Items on Depots and dropped items can be processed by matching Create fan recipes.
Water extinguishes fires and campfires in the visible spray path.
Walls block spray effects, so protected flames behind the glass remain untouched.
createfirefightingadd.ponder.nozzle_flui: Change the stored fluid to change what the nozzle does.
Lava and ignited fuels use heated processing, light fires, and melt snow or ice.
With Create: Dragons Plus installed, dragon breath gains its own particles and processing type.
createfirefightingadd.ponder.water_intak: Water Intakes search nearby infinite water sources and can find water below moving contraptions.
Right-click the intake while holding a Bucket Controller to bind them.
The intake works only while it has both kinetic stress and a redstone signal.
Bound Bucket Controllers are filled first.
Once the bound controller is full, remaining water is pushed into the rear pipe network.
The connected tank receives the water after the controller has been supplied.
createfirefightingadd.ponder.bucket_cont: Bucket Controllers are used for large-area fire suppression, usually supplied by a Water Intake.
Apply redstone to activate the downward spray.
The falling stream covers a wide area below the controller.
Use the side value setting to adjust spray height. Higher settings narrow the cone.
createfirefightingadd.ponder.fire_hose_c: Fire Hoses carry fluid when driven by an external pump, even across moving physical structures.
The hose inherits the pump range: distance from pump to hose plus distance behind the output hose equals the pump's total range. Non-Create pumps are supported, but may have compatibility issues.
Right-click either end with black dye to use a black hose. White dye restores the original color.
